rulings.Case Title: ALAN HONNIBALL VS. JP MORGAN CHASE BANK N.A. et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, June 20, 2013, line 1. DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA RECONVEYANCE COMPANY N.A., U.S. BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION, JP MORGAN CHASE BANK N.A., and JPMORGAN MORGAGE ACQUISITION CORP's DEMURRER TO 4TH AMENDED COMPLAINT SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. Plaintiff failed to allege tender. Allegations in FAC (Paragraph 10) and/or judicially noticeable documents show that foreclosure is not void as a matter of law and Plaintiff had to allege tender in order to challenge foreclosure. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: BRANDY A. TRUEMAN VS. CALIFORNIA RECONVEYANCE COMPANY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn For Order Vacating Dismissal On Equitable Grounds And Transferring Venue To The County Of Marin
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, June 20, 2013, line 2. PLAINTIFF BRANDY TRUEMAN's Motion For Order Vacating Dismissal On Equitable Grounds And Transferring Venue To The County Of Marin Continued to June 21, 2013. Courtesy copies to moving papers received on June 19, 2013 at 11:55 a.m. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CONSTANCE BOURGES VS. DANY SCHER et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, June 20, 2013, line 3. DEFENDANT DANNY SCHER's DEMURRER TO 3RD AMENDED COMPLAINT SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND: (1) to re-allege omitted cause of action for nuisance; (2) to allege fact re: duty to prevent smoking in front of premises; and (3) to allege foreseeability of assault. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CONSTANCE BOURGES VS. DANY SCHER et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, June 20, 2013, line 3. DEFENDANT DANNY SCHER's MOTION TO STRIKE 3RD AMENDED COMPLAINT GRANTED with leave to amend as to request for punitive damages and attachment. CRIMEMAPPING regarding crimes in 2012-2013 is irrelevant to allegations in the complaint in relating to 2009-2010 incidents. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: BETTY ANN MORRIS VS. JACQUELINE GREAUX et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Extension Of Code Of Civil Procedure Sec 1161.2
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, June 20, 2013, line 6. DEFENDANT JACQUELINE GREAUX's Motion for Extension Of Code Of Civil Procedure Sec 1161.2 GRANTED. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: QUINCY YU et al VS. JEFFREY YU et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Vacate Voluntary Dismissal And Enter Dismissal With Prejudice Ordering That Deft Is The Prevailing Party And Awarding Deft Costs Including Attorneys Fees
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, June 20, 2013, line 7. DEFENDANT JEFFREY YU's Motion To Vacate Voluntary Dismissal And Enter Dismissal With Prejudice Ordering That Defendant Is The Prevailing Party And Awarding Defendant Costs Including Attorneys Fees DENIED. Moving party fails to cite any authority for the proposition that voluntary dismissal should be vacated. = (501/REQ)
